curation.synopsis: The first volume of the supplementary 'Ghost Dossier' series is a prequel novella set chronologically before the famous Sabbat-Crusade campaigns of First and Only. Fresh out of their gruelling first engagement on Voltemand, the newly raised Tanith First-and-Only is pulled off the front line and parked in an agricultural backwater — the Vincula Sub-sector capital, Vincula City — for what Crusade Command labels permanent-peace enforcement and Gaunt's regiment recognises as garrison-duty exile. The Ghosts, still figuring out who they are as a unit, must hold the city for the arrival of a new provincial governor and his administrative staff. Almost immediately the regiment becomes the target of a highly disciplined insurgency operating from inside the city itself — one that knows the Tanith's deployment cycles too well, kills with patience, and eventually reveals dark truths about the regiment's own origins that will echo through the series. Novella-length, structurally a counterinsurgency procedural with a slow-mystery spine.
